entries.label: Carbon Composite (C/C or CFRP)
entries.notes: C/C composites demonstrated in high-temperature aerospace applications (re-entry, nozzles). Emissivity varies with surface finish and temperature; 0.85 is a representative high-emissivity value. Oxidation concern in atmosphere; vacuum operation is favorable.

entries.label: Silicon Carbide (SiC)
entries.notes: SiC is a mature structural/thermal ceramic with excellent high-temperature stability and high emissivity. Higher areal density than C/C. Brittle fracture is primary structural risk. Used in telescope mirrors and thermal protection systems.

entries.label: Refractory Metal (Generic Class)
entries.notes: Generic refractory metal class (W, Mo, Re, Nb). High melting points but high density and low emissivity without coatings. Oxidation in atmosphere; vacuum-compatible. Emissivity strongly coating-dependent; 0.30 is a bare-metal estimate.

entries.label: Molybdenum Alloy (Mo-Re, TZM)
entries.notes: Mo alloys (TZM, Mo-Re) have very high temperature capability and better ductility than pure Mo. Used in rocket nozzles and high-temperature structural applications. Emissivity low without coating. Oxidizes rapidly in air above ~600 K.

entries.label: Tungsten Alloy (W-Re, W-Cu)
entries.notes: Highest melting point of practical metals. Very high density; mass penalty is significant. W-Re has improved ductility. Used in high-temperature electrodes, nozzle throats, and radiation shielding. Radiator application requires careful mass budget.

entries.label: Eutectic Metal Compatible (PCM Storage)
entries.notes: Generic class for eutectic metal alloys suitable for high-temperature PCM thermal storage (Si-Al, Cu-Si class). Containment and materials compatibility are primary development risks. Emissivity reference value only; surface condition varies.

entries.label: Liquid Metal Compatible (Loop Fluid)
entries.notes: Generic class for liquid metal loop working fluids (Li, Na, K, NaK). High thermal conductivity, wide operating range. Containment, pump, and corrosion/contamination management are critical. Areal density not applicable (fluid, not panel). Research required for any spacecraft application.

entries.label: Custom Material (Operator-Specified)
entries.notes: All values must be specified by operator.
